connectors.name: REST Countries
connectors.response_body: {% set countries = response.body | from_json | sort(attribute='population', reverse=true) %}[{% for country in countries[:5] %}{{ {'name': country.name.common, 'capital': country.capital[0], 'population': country.population, 'flag': country.flags.png, 'region': country.region} | tojson }}{% if not loop.last %}, {% endif %}{% endfor %}]
